'''鈭歫-v-y''' ('''kajavay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pedestrianate|pedestrianate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pedestrianate|pedestrianate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-v-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajavay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijavay|thijavay]] || [[word:jijavay|jijavay]] || [[word:shijavay|shijavay]] || [[word:kijavay|kijavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujavay|thuthujavay]] || [[word:jujujavay|jujujavay]] || [[word:shushujavay|shushujavay]] || [[word:kukujavay|kukujavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujavay|thujavay]] || [[word:jujavay|jujavay]] || [[word:shujavay|shujavay]] || [[word:kujavay|kujavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujavay|thujavay]] || [[word:jujavay|jujavay]] || [[word:shujavay|shujavay]] || [[word:kujavay|kujavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejavay|thejavay]] || [[word:jejavay|jejavay]] || [[word:shejavay|shejavay]] || [[word:kejavay|kejavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojavay|thothojavay]] || [[word:jojojavay|jojojavay]] || [[word:shoshojavay|shoshojavay]] || [[word:kokojavay|kokojavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojavay|thojavay]] || [[word:jojavay|jojavay]] || [[word:shojavay|shojavay]] || [[word:kojavay|kojavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojavay|thojavay]] || [[word:jojavay|jojavay]] || [[word:shojavay|shojavay]] || [[word:kojavay|kojavay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]] || [[word:javay|javay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙javay|th忙javay]] || [[word:j忙javay|j忙javay]] || [[word:sh忙javay|sh忙javay]] || [[word:k忙javay|k忙javay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajavay|thathajavay]] || [[word:jajajavay|jajajavay]] || [[word:shashajavay|shashajavay]] || [[word:kakajavay|kakajavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajavay|thajavay]] || [[word:jajavay|jajavay]] || [[word:shajavay|shajavay]] || [[word:kajavay|kajavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajavay|thajavay]] || [[word:jajavay|jajavay]] || [[word:shajavay|shajavay]] || [[word:kajavay|kajavay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajavay|shajavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajavay|goshajavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajavay|gokishajavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajavayn眉|shajavayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajavaynkn眉|goshajavaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavayn眉|gokishajavayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajavaysh毛|shajavaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajavaynksh毛|goshajavaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajavaysh毛|gokishajavaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavayro|shajavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavaynkro|goshajavaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavayro|gokishajavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavaymu|shajavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavaynkmu|goshajavaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavaymu|gokishajavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajavaysher|shajavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajavaynksher|goshajavaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajavaysher|gokishajavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajavayng|shajavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajavaynkng|goshajavaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajavayng|gokishajavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajavayya|shajavayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajavaynkya|goshajavaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajavayya|gokishajavayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajavayyam|shajavayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajavaynkyam|goshajavaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajavayyam|gokishajavayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavayn眉sh毛|shajavayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavaynkn眉sh毛|goshajavaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavayn眉sh毛|gokishajavayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavayn眉ro|shajavayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavaynkn眉ro|goshajavaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavayn眉ro|gokishajavayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavayn眉mu|shajavayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavaynkn眉mu|goshajavaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavayn眉mu|gokishajavayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavaysh毛n眉|shajavaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavaynksh毛n眉|goshajavaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavaysh毛n眉|gokishajavaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavaysh毛ro|shajavaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavaynksh毛ro|goshajavaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavaysh毛ro|gokishajavaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavaysh毛mu|shajavaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavaynksh毛mu|goshajavaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavaysh毛mu|gokishajavaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavayron眉|shajavayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavaynkron眉|goshajavaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavayron眉|gokishajavayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavayrosh毛|shajavayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavaynkrosh毛|goshajavaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavayrosh毛|gokishajavayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavayromu|shajavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavaynkromu|goshajavaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavayromu|gokishajavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavaymun眉|shajavaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavaynkmun眉|goshajavaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavaymun眉|gokishajavaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavaymush毛|shajavaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavaynkmush毛|goshajavaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavaymush毛|gokishajavaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavaymuro|shajavaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavaynkmuro|goshajavaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavaymuro|gokishajavaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
